# Scene Contract: CH009_SC003

## Production Intent

Show the protagonist's intellectual progress and his ability to gather intelligence.

## Storyboard

Through persistent study, the protagonist masters the Martian language, allowing him to listen in on adult conversations from his sleeping quarters.
